title: Blink Charging Q4 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Blink Charging Q4 2024 Earnings Summary. Key Financial Results. Revenue Performance: Q4 2024 revenue: $30.2 million 20% sequential increase, Full-year 2024 revenue: $126.2 million down from $140.6 million in 2023, Service revenues grew 24% YoY to $9.8 million in Q4, Full-year service revenues reached record $34.8 million, up 31.8% YoY. Profitability Metrics: Full-year gross margin: 32% up from 29% in 2023, Q4 gross margin: 25% impacted by $2.9M asset adjustment, Adjusted EBITDA loss improved 25% YoY to -$10.6M in Q4, Full-year adjusted EBITDA loss of -$49.5M, improving 13% from 2023. Strategic Highlights: Blink Forward Initiative: Five-pillar strategy focusing on profitability, customer-centric models, DC fast charger expansion, recurring revenues, and capital optimization. Network Expansion: Blink-owned chargers increased 33% to 6,867 units, driving service revenue growth. DC fast charger revenue surged nearly 500% year-over-year. Cost Reductions: Cash burn declined 51% in 2024, compensation expenses cut 37% annually, adjusted operating expenses down 24%. 2025 Outlook: Service revenues expected to grow throughout 2025, product revenue in H1 matching H2 2024 levels.
